cftc_settlement_2022.outcome: Polymarket agreed to pay fine and block US users

fbi_raid.reason: DOJ investigating whether Polymarket allowed US users on international platform
fbi_raid.outcome: DOJ and CFTC formally ended investigations Jul 2025 - declination notices issued

qcex_acquisition.significance: Acquired CFTC-licensed Designated Contract Exchange and clearinghouse

cftc_amended_order.significance: CFTC granted Amended Order of Designation - legal US operation

cftc_no_action_letter.significance: New CFTC chairman withdrew proposed rules restricting prediction markets

cftc_vs_states.description: CFTC filed lawsuits against 3 states challenging their authority to regulate platforms like Kalshi
cftc_vs_states.significance: Federal government actively fighting for prediction market jurisdiction

arizona.allegations: Operating illegal gambling business, offering election wagering

tennessee.action: Cease-and-desist to Polymarket, Kalshi, and Crypto.com

federal_legislation.scope: Would restrict or ban prediction markets on sports, elections, war-related events
federal_legislation.kentucky_bill: Specifically carves out national prediction markets from sports-betting framework for licensed sportsbooks
federal_legislation.supreme_court_timeline: Unlikely before 2027 - key question is whether federal CFTC authorisation preempts state gambling regulation

major_markets: United States (international blocked; US exchange separate)

international_restrictions.enforcement_method: IP-based geoblocking via dedicated geoblock API

offshore_resilience_argument.thesis: Even if US regulatory picture deteriorates significantly, Polymarket has a vibrant offshore business generating >90% of volume. This mirrors the crypto industry pattern where global platforms thrive despite US restrictions.

precedents.notes: Largest crypto exchange globally despite US restrictions. Operates Binance.US as separate regulated entity.
Moved to own appchain. US users restricted. Volume driven by global user base.
No US restrictions currently but primarily non-US user base. $15B/day volume.
Operated successfully for years serving non-US users despite no US access.

offshore_resilience_argument.key_point: Polymarket's international platform in 180+ countries with no KYC is the core business. The US exchange is additive optionality, not the base case.

israeli_air_force.description: Multiple IAF members interrogated/indicted for betting on timing of Israeli strikes on Iran during Twelve Day War
israeli_air_force.quote: Air force officer stated during interrogation: 'the entire squadron is on Polymarket, the entire air force is betting'

maduro_ouster.description: Newly created account netted $400K+ from positions on Maduro being ousted and US actions in Venezuela

journalist_harassment.description: Users with large bets on Iranian missile strike harassed Times of Israel journalist Emanuel Fabian to alter reporting
journalist_harassment.outcome: Polymarket condemned behavior, banned involved users. RSF issued statement.
